title: Capability Token Revocation List
description: Revocation list for capability tokens per ADR-0003 (PROPOSED) and SECURITY.md §8. List version MUST be monotonically increasing; stale lists MUST be rejected (anti-rollback). additionalProperties=false for fail-closed.

list_version.description: Monotonically increasing version; lower versions MUST be rejected (anti-rollback)

issuer.description: Only the policy engine may issue revocation lists

revoked_jtis.description: List of revoked token jti values

signature_manifest_ref.description: Reference to detached signature manifest covering this list (SECURITY.md §8)

description: Revocation list for capability tokens. key_purpose MUST be capability_token_revocation (distinct from policy_bundle and sbom). Verifiers MUST reject tokens whose jti appears in the latest valid revocation list, even if signature and time are valid (MACHINE_READABLE_CONTRACTS.md §7.6).
